summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Log de Atividades (Activity Log) feature on Minha Conta page. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly including Perfil tab, Segurança tab, and Atividades tab with timeline, filters, and refresh button.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - chart container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only). Known issue from previous iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: AtividadeUsuarioModel correctly implemented with all required fields
Activity logging service (atividade_service.py) follows good patterns with comprehensive type mapping
Activity registration properly integrated into login, alterar_senha, and alterar_perfil endpoints
Frontend ConfiguracaoContaPage.jsx correctly implements timeline visualization with icon/color mapping
Retrocompatibility with legacy auditorias maintained - good backward compatibility
seed_data_creation: Test data for password change and profile update restored after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Log de Atividades feature is fully functional. Tests cover GET /api/auth/me/atividades endpoint with filtering, activity logging on login/password change/profile update, validation rules, and frontend UI components.

atividades.GET /api/auth/me/atividades: PASS - Returns atividades, auditorias, pedidos_recentes, tipos_disponiveis
atividades.GET /api/auth/me/atividades?limite=200: PASS - Returns 422 for exceeding max limit

activity_logging.Login creates activity: PASS - tipo=login, descricao='Fez login no sistema'
activity_logging.Password change creates activity: PASS - tipo=alterar_senha, descricao='Alterou a senha de acesso'

minha_conta_page.page_title: PASS - Shows 'Minha Conta' title with subtitle
minha_conta_page.user_card: PASS - Shows user name, email, role badge (Administrador)
minha_conta_page.tabs: PASS - Perfil, Segurança, Atividades tabs all visible and clickable

perfil_tab.form_fields: PASS - Nome Completo and Email inputs with data-testid

seguranca_tab.password_form: PASS - Senha Atual, Nova Senha, Confirmar Nova Senha inputs
seguranca_tab.eye_icons: PASS - Password visibility toggle icons present

atividades_tab.log_title: PASS - 'Log de Atividades' title with description
atividades_tab.filter_dropdown: PASS - Shows 'Todas as atividades' and filter options (Logins, Pedidos criados, etc)
atividades_tab.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button functional with data-testid
atividades_tab.timeline_visual: PASS - Timeline with vertical line and circular icons
atividades_tab.activity_items: PASS - Found 24+ activity items with icons, descriptions, timestamps
